title: Daniel Sloss: Really…?!
full_description: New show from Scotland's internationally acclaimed, award-winning comedian — his 6th consecutive sold-out Fringe season at the Edinburgh International Conference Centre, followed by a substantial European tour. Sharp, dark and utterly confident stand-up with Sloss at his most provocative.
ai_summary: Daniel Sloss's sixth consecutive sold-out Fringe season — the young Scottish comedian already known for his dark, politically sharp and technically precise stand-up, performing to over 10,000 people at the EICC.
